creator: dvwerks@cox.net
text:
This looks like a problem;
ERROR: invalid device tree

I see an older u-boot in use. Have you tried updating it?

Another suggestion. Build u-boot from ports and copy the dtb from /work too.

Does Single User mode act any differently?

Looks like HDMI is last on screen. That makes me wonder about i2c and CEC.

I am using FreeBSD on Hummingboard, another imx6 platform. It works fine but I have crashing when I enable any dtbo overlay.
I suspect libfdt or something in that vein.
When I manually place device in decompiled device tree all is well.

So no device tree overlays being loaded right?
I don't see any attempting to load in your dmesg.
